comments:
AccessibilityRef is built specifically around the European Accessibility Act (EAA — Directive (EU) 2019/882) and its harmonised standard EN 301 549. The
  tool suite covers the full conformance lifecycle: scoping, self-assessment, statement generation, declaration of conformity, and ongoing audit. Built by
  accessibilityref in the EU.
features:
AccessibilityRef is a suite of 50+ EU-compliance tools for the European Accessibility Act (EAA). It generates WCAG 2.2 audit checklists, accessibility
  statements, EAA conformance reports, declarations of conformity, contrast palettes, ARIA assistance, and fine-risk calculators. Built for auditors,
  developers, and compliance teams.
title: AccessibilityRef
